name: QA 507
description:
PCP QA Test No. 507

exercises the pcp(1) works with an archive generates from

our own pmlogger config file for it.  also checks bug #640234



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform ubuntu1604 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 507

exercises the pcp(1) works with an archive generates from

our own pmlogger config file for it. also checks bug #640234

Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform ubuntu1604 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 507.out.bad)
7a8,21
> 1,11c1
> < Performance Co-Pilot configuration on HOST:
> < 
> <  platform: Linux HOST 5.3.0-1034-azure #35~18.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Mon Jul 13 12:54:45 UTC 2020 x86_64
> <  hardware: 2 cpus, 2 disks, 1 node, 6927MB RAM
> <  timezone: UTC
> <  services: pmcd
> <      pmcd: Version 5.2.1-1, 12 agents, 3 clients
> <      pmda: root pmcd proc pmproxy xfs sample sampledso linux mmv kvm
> <            jbd2 simple
> <  pmlogger: primary logger: /var/log/pcp/pmlogger/HOST/20200820.17.44
> <      pmie: primary engine: /var/log/pcp/pmie/HOST/pmie.log
> ---
> > pcp-summary: Cannot connect to PMCD on host "HOST": No route to host
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f simple.numfetch
